title: oncidium obstipum
intro: Oncidium obstipum, also known as the "yellow oncidium", is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Oncidium obstipum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, Oncidium obstipum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used as a powder in traditional medicine.
